## Description

Briefly describe the problem this PR solves or the feature it adds.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `bun run build` passes (tsc + vite)
- [ ] Tested manually with photo folder
- [ ] Rust tests pass (`cargo test`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the existing style (rustfmt, prettier)
- [ ] I've tested the change on my platform: \_\_\_
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
